description: This is one of the 68 miniature rooms conceived by Narcissa Niblack Thorne and constructed by master craftsmen according to her specifications. Thorne intended this bedroom of a Normandy country home to show the how a growing middle class outside of Paris adapted some of the innovations in comfort and style characteristic of Louis XV's reign for their relatively modest homes.
artist_info:
Designed by Narcissa Niblack Thorne
American
1882-1966
title: E-22: French Provincial Bedroom of the Louis XV Period, 18th Century
